body.negative_controls: required controls before promotion of any route
body.scan_actions: next bounded scan plan emitted by L3 scheduler
body.storage_channel_receipts: detected on-chain storage surfaces from source chains
body.waveprobe_receipts: bounded list of wave/eigen/density diagnostic summaries

forbidden_body_fields: payloads intended to hide from moderation or provenance

chain_model.data_availability: on-chain summaries plus content-addressed off-chain sidecars

claim_boundary: Protocol design receipt only. This does not create a blockchain, token, market, consensus network, compression result, or Hutter Prize claim. It defines a local/devnet receipt substrate for metaprobe and waveprobe state.

decision_law.ADMIT: All required hashes replay, source windows exist, and negative controls do not collapse the signal.
decision_law.HOLD: Evidence is incomplete, cost is unknown, payload surface is unverified, or object-level provenance is missing.
decision_law.QUARANTINE: Hash mismatch, unsafe payload class, missing provenance, or claim boundary violation.

next_implementation_steps: Create a JSON fixture block with one WAVE_RECEIPT, one META_RECEIPT, and one SCAN_POLICY_UPDATE.
Add a verifier that recomputes the block hash and merkle roots.
Feed the current blockchain_l3_self_scan_scheduler receipt into the first fixture block.
Run negative controls before any compression-route promotion.
Only after local fixture replay works, consider a small append-only local devnet.

l3_scheduler.storage: scanner policy hash and action list

metadata_blitter.input: fixed-size metadata words from chain/block/window records
metadata_blitter.output: sortable route keys and packed metric words
metadata_blitter.storage: blitter shader hash, parameter receipt, key/metric buffer hashes

metaprobe.input: domain priors, route families, previous scan receipts
metaprobe.output: policy/context update and HOLD/ADMIT/QUARANTINE decision hints
metaprobe.storage: decision receipt, route vector, source receipt backlinks

waveprobe.input: byte windows, block fields, density neighborhoods, eigenvalue spectra
waveprobe.output: local signal vector plus residual/curvature summary
waveprobe.storage: hash, vector summary, source window receipt, not raw bulk by default

purpose.anti_goal: Do not use public commodity ledgers as arbitrary bulk storage when a purpose-built receipt chain is enough.
purpose.core_use: Store replayable probe-state commitments so scanning can route itself over time.
purpose.expanded_role: Numerical Universe Vector Map receipt chain
purpose.name: NUVMAP

radix_bin_model.claim_boundary: Radix bins are route basins, not semantic labels.
radix_bin_model.stability_rule: Promote only bins that persist across salts, windows, and negative controls.
